calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Lai Pheng Leng was present in present in pro per on behalf of herself, and as Guardian ad litem for the Minor Yean Yee Ooi, who was not present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Service in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Olivia Lai Leong.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Audrey Yean-Yee Ooi.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
